{"id":"da-cjr","title":"Implement forum connector - scrape Tor-based forums for threat intel","description":"Scrape BreachForums, XSS.is, Exploit.in and similar forums via Tor SOCKS proxy. Use aiohttp with aiohttp-socks through tor_socks_proxy. {"id":"da-xlg","title":"Add API endpoint for trapline integration - institution domain/BIN lookup","description":"Create a lightweight API endpoint for trapline to query darkdisco institutions by domain similarity. GET /api/integration/match-domain?domain=example-bank.com should return matching institutions based on primary_domain, additional_domains, and fuzzy name matching. Also GET /api/integration/institutions/domains to bulk-export all monitored domains for trapline to cache locally. These endpoints support the trapline-darkdisco connector where trapline prioritizes phishing targets impersonating darkdisco-monitored institutions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"crashish@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T20:59:57Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-12T20:59:57Z"}

old_value: {"id":"da-3d8","title":"Add trapline connector - sync institutions as watchlist and ingest phishing findings","description":"Darkdisco acts as a client of trapline SaaS. Create a connector that: 1) Syncs all active institution domains, names, and BINs to trapline via POST /api/v1/watchlist/domains and /bins endpoints. Runs periodically to keep in sync. 2) Receives phishing findings from trapline via incoming webhook at POST /api/webhooks/trapline. Parses the finding payload, matches to institution, creates a darkdisco Finding with source_type=trapline. 3) Config: trapline_api_url, trapline_api_key, webhook_secret for HMAC verification. This makes darkdisco a consumer of trapline phishing intelligence for its monitored financial institutions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"crashish@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T21:03:37Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-12T21:03:37Z"}

{"id":"da-jco","title":"Sources page overhaul - health consistency, enable/disable toggle, degraded status details","description":"Multiple issues with the sources page need fixing:

1. HEALTH INCONSISTENCY: Telegram Stealer Logs shows healthy on overview cards but offline in detail view. The health computation needs to be consistent between list and detail endpoints.

2. ENABLE/DISABLE TOGGLE: Each source card and detail view needs a toggle switch to enable/disable the source. Wire to PUT /sources/{id} with enabled field. Currently 5 sources enabled and 11 disabled - users need to manage this from the UI.

3. DEGRADED STATUS DETAILS: When a source is degraded or has errors, the detail view should prominently show last_error, last_polled_at, and poll_interval_seconds so the user understands why. Show error messages in a dismissable alert banner.

4. DISABLED SOURCE VISIBILITY: Disabled sources should still appear in the overview but visually distinct (greyed out or marked). Currently unclear if disabled sources show at all.

5. Source list should show enabled/disabled filter toggle.

Frontend files: Sources.tsx, SourceDetail.tsx, api.ts, types.ts
Backend: GET /sources endpoint optionally filters by enabled, GET /sources/{id} needs same health computation as list endpoint.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"crashish@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T21:10:03Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-12T21:10:03Z"}

new_value:
{"description":"attached_molecule: da-wisp-w4pl
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-12T21:10:51Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Multiple issues with the sources page need fixing:

1. HEALTH INCONSISTENCY: Telegram Stealer Logs shows healthy on overview cards but offline in detail view. The health computation needs to be consistent between list and detail endpoints.

2. ENABLE/DISABLE TOGGLE: Each source card and detail view needs a toggle switch to enable/disable the source. Wire to PUT /sources/{id} with enabled field. Currently 5 sources enabled and 11 disabled - users need to manage this from the UI.

3. DEGRADED STATUS DETAILS: When a source is degraded or has errors, the detail view should prominently show last_error, last_polled_at, and poll_interval_seconds so the user understands why. Show error messages in a dismissable alert banner.

4. DISABLED SOURCE VISIBILITY: Disabled sources should still appear in the overview but visually distinct (greyed out or marked). Currently unclear if disabled sources show at all.

5. Source list should show enabled/disabled filter toggle.

Frontend files: Sources.tsx, SourceDetail.tsx, api.ts, types.ts
Backend: GET /sources endpoint optionally filters by enabled, GET /sources/{id} needs same health computation as list endpoint."}
